nasb.text: Then Asa was angry with the seer and put him in prison, for he was enraged at him for this. And Asa oppressed some of the people at the same time.

esv.text: Then Asa was angry with the seer and put him in the stocks in prison, for he was in a rage with him because of this. And Asa inflicted cruelties upon some of the people at the same time.

cnv.text: 於是亞撒對先見發怒，把他囚在監裡，因為亞撒為了這事很惱怒他。同時亞撒也壓迫人民。

ccb.text: 亚撒听了就对先见发怒，把他囚禁在监狱里，同时又压迫一些民众。
